address1.description: The street name of the address.

address2.description: The second line of the address.

address3.description: The third line of the address.

apartment.description: The apartment or house number of the address. If an address has both an apartment and a house number, set the house number, and set the apartment number in `address2`.

country.description:
The country of the address.

 **Format:** [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2#Officially_assigned_code_elements).

language.description: The language used for the UI and email communications.

screening_status.description: The screening status of the account; initially 'pending' and then 'approved' or 'declined'.

zipcode.description:
The ZIP code of the address. 

 **Format:** Spaces are supported.

ApiUser.description: The identifiers for the API key.

merchant_id.description: The unique identifier of the account.

site_id.description:
The unique identifier of the site.

See [Site ID, API key, and secure code](https://docs.multisafepay.com/docs/sites#site-id-api-key-and-security-code).

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the account.

amount_available.description: The amount of funds available in the account's MultiSafepay balance.

amount_reserved.description: The amount reserved in the MultiSafepay balance.

currency.description:
The currency of the MultiSafepay balance.

 **Format:** [ISO-4217 currency code](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217).

id.description: The unique identifier of the MultiSafepay balance.

modified.description:
The timestamp for when the balance was last modified.

 **Format:** [ISO 8601 time](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601).

currency.description: The currency of the bank account.

holder_name.description: The name of the account holder.

filename.description: The filename of the bank statement.

mime_type.description: The MIME type of the file.

account_id.description: The unique identifier for the account.

amount.description:
The balance amount in the currency's smallest unit:

- Decimal currencies: Value for 10 EUR = 1000 (1000 cents)
- Zero-decimal currencies: Value for 10 YEN = 10

amount_uncleared.description: The amount of uncleared payments in the currency's smallest unit.

bic.description: The bank identification code (BIC) for the business bank account that the payout is sent to.

closing_date.description: The date the closing balance was issued.

currency.description: The currency of the balance.

iban.description: The international bank account number (IBAN) for the business bank account that the payout is sent to.

payout_amount.description: The amount paid out in the currency's smallest unit.

payout_transaction_id.description: The transaction ID of the [automatic payout](https://docs.multisafepay.com/account/payouts/#automated-and-manual-payouts), if set up.

after.description: The URL for the next page of results.

before.description: The URL for the previous page of results.

after.description: The identifier of the next page of results.

before.description: The identifier of the previous page of results.

limit.description: The number of results returned per page.

address1.description: The first line of the address.

address2.description: The second line of the address.

address3.description: The third line of the address.

brand.description: The merchant brand associated with this profile.

country.description:
The country of the address.

 **Format:** [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2#Officially_assigned_code_elements)

first_name.description:
The customer's first name.

We recommend always requiring the customer to provide their full name, instead of initials or abbreviations.

forwarded_ip.description: The [X-Forwarded-For](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/X-Forwarded-For) header of the customer object when using a proxy.

house_number.description: The house number of the address.

locale.description:
The customer's country. Used to apply country-related settings.

 **Format:** [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2#Officially_assigned_code_elements)

nickname.description: The name the customer prefers to be addressed by.

prefix.description: The prefix in the customer's last name.

state.description:
The state of the customer's address.

title.description: The customer's personal title, e.g. Mr, Mrs, Miss.

zip_code.description:
The customer's ZIP code. 

 **Format:** Spaces are supported.

total.description: The total number of pages of results returned.

additional_data.description: Additional data for the payment method.

allowed_amount.description: The minimum and maximum `amount` allowed for the payment method.

max.description: The maximum `amount` (in eurocents) allowed for the payment method.

min.description: The minimum `amount` (in eurocents) allowed for the payment method.

allowed_countries.description:
Countries where the payment method is supported.

 An empty array means that the payment method has no country restrictions.

**Format:** [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2#Officially_assigned_code_elements).

allowed_currencies.description:
Currencies supported by the payment method.

brands.description: Information about any co-branded versions of the payment method.

icon_urls.description: URLs to different versions of the co-branded payment method logo.

large.description: URL to a large-sized version of the co-branded payment method logo.

medium.description: URL to a medium-sized version of the co-branded payment method logo.

vector.description: URL to a vector version of the co-branded payment method logo.

name.description: The name of the payment method.

preferred_countries.description:
Countries where customers prefer the payment method.

required_customer_data.description: An array of customer information that is required for the payment method.

shopping_cart_required.description: Whether checkout information (i.e. `shopping_cart` and `customer`) is required for payments.

supported_apps.description: Applications supported by the payment method.

currency.description:
The currency of the payment.

mcc.description: Merchant category code; only allowed for payment facilitators.

notification_url.description: The [webhook endpoint](https://docs.multisafepay.com/docs/configure-your-webhook/) for MultiSafepay to send status updates and other notifications for this site.

price_from.description: The minimum transaction amount (in eurocents) for the site.

price_till.description: The maximum transaction amount (in eurocents) for the site.

support_email.description: The customer support email address for the site.

support_phone.description: The customer support phone number for the site.

scope.description: Information about the payment method and currency where the fees apply.

currency.description: The currency of the payment. If empty, the fee applies to all currencies that do not already have a fee.

payment_type.description: The unique identifier for the payment method.

type.description: The type of the fee. The only supported value is "payment".

until.description:

 **Format:** [ISO 8601 time](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601).

get.description: List all transactions under an account or site.

schema.description: Returns transactions with the specified [transaction status](https://docs.multisafepay.com/docs/payment-statuses/).
Returns transactions using the specified payment method(s).
Returns transactions of the specified type. `withdrawal` returns manual and automatic payouts.

Returns transactions created before but not on the specified date.

 **Format:** [ISO 8601 time](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601).

Returns transactions created on or after the specified date.

 **Format:** [ISO 8601 time](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601).
Returns transactions with the specified [order status](https://docs.multisafepay.com/docs/payment-statuses/).

Returns transactions completed on or before the specified date.

 **Format:** [ISO 8601 time](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601).
Returns only debit or credit transactions.

Returns transactions completed before but not on the specified date.

 **Format:** [ISO 8601 time](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601).

The unique identifier of the site.

If unset, transactions for **all** sites under your account are returned.

amount.description:

The customer's first name.
